name: Euro Plaid Decorative Throw Pillow - Threshold™
description:
Add a sophisticated accent to your living room decor with the Euro Plaid Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™. This throw pillow features a Euro plaid pattern in camel and white shades with fringe edges along the sides for an elegant look. The 100% woven cotton exterior with polyester fiber filling provides a comfy surface to lean back and relax, while the sewn-seam closure offers a neat finish.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
